title: 10 best herbal teas for frozen shoulder
intro_desc: Herbal teas for frozen shoulder are a natural remedy that helps alleviate the pain and stiffness associated with this condition. They work by reducing inflammation, promoting relaxation, and improving blood circulation. The best herbal teas for frozen shoulder include Glycyrrhiza glabra, Curcuma longa, Zingiber officinale, Achillea millefolium, Camellia sinensis, Capsicum annuum, Arnica montana, Cinchona officinalis, Artemisia absinthium, and Clematis vitalba. If left untreated, frozen shoulder can severely impact daily life, limiting mobility and causing chronic pain, making everyday tasks a struggle and affecting overall well-being.
